# See https://help.agi.com/stk/#stk/tools-dataupdate.htm for details on data sources used to create this file.

# Note: This file uses Marshall Mean Cycle data for the solar cycle following the current cycle. This data set is then repeated 
# to provide a notional representation of the next several solar cycles. More information on the Marshall Mean Cycle data is 
# located here: https://www.nasa.gov/solar-cycle-progression-and-forecast/
#
# FORMAT(I4,I3,I3,I5,I3,8I3,I4,8I4,I4,F4.1,I2,I4,F6.1,I2,5F6.1)

# --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
